Successful applicants may also benefit from mentorship, expanded professional networks, and opportunities for future investment. Funding Available Eligible SMEs may receive up to USD 1.5 million in grant funding to support business growth and expansion activities. The exact amount awarded may depend on the nature of the proposed project, its scalability, expected development impact, and the applicant s overall funding needs. What Can the Grant Be Used For? The programme supports a broad range of business development activities. Eligible expenditures include: Working capital to support business operations. Pilot deployments for testing and validating innovative products or services. Technical assistance and capacity-building activities. Climate-related investments. Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) initiatives. Market research to identify new business opportunities. Feasibility studies for expansion projects. Equipment procurement. Technology acquisition and implementation. Monitoring, Evaluation, and Learning (MEL) activities. Activities that strengthen operational efficiency and long-term sustainability. These eligible expenditures are intended to help SMEs build stronger businesses while increasing their economic and social impact. Additional Benefits of the Programme Beyond grant funding, successful applicants may gain access to several valuable opportunities, including: Mentorship from experienced business professionals. Access to regional and international business networks. Potential follow-on financing opportunities. Increased visibility among investors and development partners. Support in strengthening investment readiness. Opportunities to improve organizational capacity and business performance. These additional benefits can help businesses position themselves for sustainable growth beyond the grant period. Who Can Apply? The SME Growth Accelerator targets high-potential Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) that are ready to scale their operations and demonstrate strong growth potential. Applicants should be able to demonstrate: A legally established SME. Strong growth ambitions. A scalable business model. Capacity to expand into new markets. Potential to create quality employment opportunities. Readiness to effectively manage grant funding. Commitment to delivering measurable business and development outcomes. Applicants are encouraged to review the official programme guidelines to confirm all eligibility requirements before applying. Eligible Regions The programme is open to eligible SMEs operating in the following regions: Africa Asia Latin America The Caribbean Businesses located within these regions are encouraged to explore the opportunity if they meet the programme s eligibility criteria. Application Process Interested SMEs should prepare a comprehensive proposal outlining: Their business model. Growth strategy. Market expansion plans. Expected development impact. Job creation potential. Budget and funding requirements. Implementation timeline. Monitoring and evaluation approach. A well-prepared proposal that clearly demonstrates scalability, financial readiness, and measurable impact is likely to be more competitive. Click here for more and to apply Consulting Support The programme information indicates that consulting services are available to assist SMEs in preparing investment-ready funding proposals aligned with international evaluation standards. These services may include support in: Strategic planning. Results-Based Management (RBM). Business development planning. Defining measurable outcomes. Strengthening implementation frameworks. Monitoring and evaluation planning. Sustainability planning. Developing evidence-based funding applications. Such support can help businesses submit stronger and more competitive applications. Important Dates Application Deadline 15 November 2026 Additional timelines mentioned include: Request for Quotation Deadline: Rolling, subject to availability. Confirmation of Consulting Services Deadline: Rolling, subject to availability. Applicants are encouraged to submit their applications well before the closing date to avoid delays. Tips for a Strong Application To improve your chances of success: Present a clear and realistic business growth strategy. Demonstrate market demand for your products or services. Highlight expected job creation. Explain how funding will accelerate business growth. Include measurable performance indicators. Show financial sustainability beyond the grant period. Demonstrate organizational capacity to implement the proposed activities. Provide realistic budgets supported by evidence. Why This Opportunity Matters Access to growth capital remains one of the biggest challenges facing SMEs in emerging markets. The IFC SME Growth Accelerator provides more than financial support—it offers businesses the opportunity to strengthen their operational capacity, expand into new markets, improve investment readiness, and create lasting economic impact. For ambitious SMEs seeking to scale sustainably while contributing to employment and economic development, this programme represents a valuable opportunity to accelerate long-term growth. Deadline Application Deadline: 15 November 2026 Click here for more global grant opportunities The post IFC SME Growth Accelerator 2026: Up to USD 1.5 Million in Grant Funding for High-Potential SMEs in Emerging Markets appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .
